free_text: Electric quadrupole strength in 20Ne from the
The fluorine target consisted of a layer of CaF2
evaporated onto a 50 mu-g/cm carbon foil.
Energy of the first excited state of Ne20=1633.674 keV
was taken by compiler from ENSDF.
The final gamma-ray angular distributions were
converted to the center-of- mass system and corrected
for the effects of the finite detector solid angle.
Background caused by the tail of the adjacent peak and
by the exponential background was subtracted.
No information on source of uncertainties

No information on source of uncertainties.
